projects.name: Vestige Engine
projects.tagline: A 3D game engine built from scratch.
projects.blurb: A modern 3D game engine written in C++ from the ground up — ray-traced rendering, dynamic lighting, physics, animation, audio and scripting, all driven by a modular engine loop. Built-in profiling and editor tools round it out.

projects.name: Ants Terminal
projects.tagline: A fast, modern terminal tuned for smoother coding sessions.
projects.blurb: A lightweight Qt6 terminal for Linux, built from scratch. Its standout feature is deep, fully-local integration with Claude Code to make AI-assisted development sessions faster and leaner — nothing is sent anywhere it doesn't need to be.

projects.name: RetroDB
projects.tagline: A ROM library manager for 150+ retro gaming systems.
projects.blurb: A web-based collection manager for retro games across 150+ platforms: hybrid metadata scraping, achievements and trophy integration, ROM tools (CHD conversion, duplicate finding, multi-disc handling), an analytics dashboard, multiple themes and role-based multi-user access.

projects.name: MAME Curator
projects.tagline: Picks the best playable arcade games from a MAME set.
projects.blurb: Turns a 40,000-machine MAME set into a human-sized arcade library. It intelligently chooses the best version of each game, lets you override picks in a browser UI, copies the chosen ROMs plus required BIOSes, and writes a ready-to-use RetroArch playlist.

projects.name: Perch
projects.tagline: Remembers every window's size and spot, with snap layouts.
projects.blurb: A system-tray window manager that remembers where each window lives — position, size, monitor and virtual desktop — and restores it on reopen. Snap presets, named layouts, per-monitor profiles, a rules engine and global hotkeys, with backends for X11 and KWin/Wayland.

projects.name: RetroArch
projects.tagline: My fork of the reference frontend for 100+ emulator cores.
projects.blurb: RetroArch is the de-facto frontend for the libretro API, supporting 100+ emulator and game-engine cores across a huge range of platforms. This is my personal fork tracking the upstream libretro/RetroArch project with my own changes on top.

projects.name: Album Builder
projects.tagline: Curate albums from recordings, with lyric-sync and reports.
projects.blurb: A desktop tool for shaping albums out of a folder of recordings: per-track curation, drag-to-reorder, live preview with optional lyric syncing, cross-album reuse tracking, and export to M3U playlists, numbered folders and polished PDF/HTML reports.

projects.name: Snatch
projects.tagline: A friendly desktop frontend for yt-dlp.
projects.blurb: A graphical front-end for yt-dlp with four tabs: download (paste or drag a URL, queue many), search (with preview), media info (inspect local files), and history. Cookie import for age-gated videos, SponsorBlock, subtitles, audio merging and one-click self-update.

projects.name: DOOM Ants
projects.tagline: A ray-traced reimagining of id's DOOM on modern Linux.
projects.blurb: A two-stage modernisation of the 1997 DOOM source: first bringing the ancient code to SDL2 on 64-bit Linux, then evolving the renderer toward true 3D with hardware ray tracing, dynamic lighting and volumetric effects — while keeping the original's feel. Early days.

projects.name: Slipcase
projects.tagline: Turns flat 2D game covers into realistic 3D box renders.
projects.blurb: A desktop tool that generates photorealistic 3D box-art renders from flat 2D cover images — multiple case types, configurable sizes, cover-art sourcing, and clean anti-aliased PNG output sized for RetroArch or LaunchBox.

projects.name: Contact List
projects.tagline: A secure contact manager with Google Contacts sync.
projects.blurb: A desktop contact manager for people and companies: search, custom fields, and two-way sync with Google Contacts, built with a security-first design.

projects.name: Rolodex
projects.tagline: An encrypted credential vault with auto-masking.
projects.blurb: A GTK4 credential manager that keeps your logins in an encrypted vault (Fernet + PBKDF2), with automatic masking of sensitive fields and a fast, low-friction search.

projects.name: Rusty PSN
projects.tagline: Download PS3 & PS4 game updates straight from Sony.
projects.blurb: A Rust tool that fetches PS3 and PS4 game updates directly from Sony's servers, with both a graphical app and a command-line interface. My fork of RainbowCookie32's rusty-psn.
